stemHtml: The use of reduced take-off thrust is permitted, only if..

options.a: the take-off distance available is lower than the take-off distance required.
options.b: the actual take-off mass is lower than the performance limited take-off mass.
options.c: the actual take-off mass including a margin is greater than the performance limited take-off mass.
options.d: the actual take-off mass is greater than the climb limited take-off mass.
